## Problem

What problem does this solve? What's the current limitation?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed approach. Include CLI/MCP interface examples if relevant.

```bash
# Example usage
kirograph your-new-command --flag value
```

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references.
